integrationsPage.title: Connect AACsearch to your stack
integrationsPage.description: Pre-built modules for popular platforms. REST API and Browser SDK for everything else.

integrations.title: Ready-made integrations
integrations.subtitle: Install in minutes. Sync automatically. Search instantly.

prestashop.title: PrestaShop 8.x
prestashop.description: Drop-in PHP module. Syncs products, categories, and stock automatically on every save.

bitrix.title: 1C-Bitrix
bitrix.description: Native Bitrix module. Event-driven product export with full catalog support.

restApi.title: REST API
restApi.description: 15 public endpoints with API-key auth. Works with any backend language or platform.

browserSdk.title: Browser SDK
browserSdk.description: Typed JavaScript client. Single search, federated multi-search, facets — under 50 ms p99.

mcpServer.title: MCP Server
mcpServer.description: Model Context Protocol integration for Claude, Cursor, and other AI agents.

custom.title: Custom connector
custom.description: 7-endpoint Connector API lets you build a sync for any data source in any language.

integrationsPrestashopPage.title: PrestaShop integration
integrationsPrestashopPage.description: Native PrestaShop 8.x module for AACsearch. Sync your product catalog automatically on every save.

integrationsPrestashop.title: AACsearch for PrestaShop
integrationsPrestashop.subtitle: Drop-in PHP module. No API coding required. Full catalog sync, real-time updates, and the search widget in minutes.

install.title: One-click install
install.description: Upload the ZIP in your PrestaShop module manager. Enter your connector token. Done.

autoSync.title: Automatic sync
autoSync.description: Product saves, updates, and deletes trigger instant sync via PrestaShop event hooks. No cron needed.

fullExport.title: Full catalog export
fullExport.description: Initial export of all products and categories with one click in the module admin panel.

widget.title: Widget embed
widget.description: Enable the AACsearch widget in the module settings. It injects into your theme's search hook automatically.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics panel
diagnostics.description: Test the connection, check last sync time, and see error logs from the module admin panel.

compatibility.title: PrestaShop 8.x compatible
compatibility.description: Tested on PrestaShop 8.0 and 8.1. PHP 8.1+. Works with all major themes.

integrationsBitrixPage.title: 1C-Bitrix integration
integrationsBitrixPage.description: Native 1C-Bitrix module for AACsearch. Sync your catalog automatically with event handlers and background agents.

integrationsBitrix.title: AACsearch for 1C-Bitrix
integrationsBitrix.subtitle: Native Bitrix module with event-driven updates and a background sync agent. No manual exports.

eventHandlers.title: Event handlers
eventHandlers.description: Product create, update, and delete trigger instant sync via Bitrix event handlers. Under 1 second latency.

backgroundAgent.title: Background sync agent
backgroundAgent.description: Bitrix agent runs periodic full sync for reliability. Catches changes missed by event handlers.

catalogSupport.title: Full catalog support
catalogSupport.description: Products, properties, prices, and stock levels. All fields in your iBlock are indexable.

adminPanel.title: Admin settings panel
adminPanel.description: Configure the connector token, index slug, and sync frequency from the Bitrix module settings.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics page
diagnostics.description: Test the connection, check index state, and verify permissions from the Bitrix admin.

support.title: Bitrix Site Manager compatible
support.description: Tested on Bitrix Site Manager and Business editions. PHP 8.1+. Uses standard Bitrix HttpClient.

integrationsRestApiPage.title: REST API integration
integrationsRestApiPage.description: 15 public endpoints with API-key auth. Works with any backend language or platform. OpenAPI 3.1 spec included.

integrationsRestApi.title: Build your own integration
integrationsRestApi.subtitle: If we don't have a native module for your platform, the REST API covers every use case.

endpoints.title: 15 endpoints
endpoints.description: Index CRUD, document CRUD (single + bulk), search, multi-search, analytics, and API key management.

openApi.title: OpenAPI 3.1
openApi.description: Machine-readable spec at /api/v1/openapi.json. Generate a client in Python, Go, Ruby, or any other language.

authentication.title: Bearer token auth
authentication.description: API keys prefixed ss_search_*, ss_connector_*, or ss_scoped_*. Each prefix carries different permissions.

webhooks.title: Outbound webhooks (soon)
webhooks.description: Receive a webhook on sync completion, quota alert, or reindex finished. Currently: Connector API for polling.

rateLimit.title: Rate limit headers
rateLimit.description: X-RateLimit-Limit and X-RateLimit-Remaining headers on every response. Retry-After on 429.

versioning.title: Versioned API
versioning.description: All public endpoints live under /api/v1. Breaking changes get a new version prefix. Old versions kept for 12 months.

integrationsBrowserSdkPage.title: Browser SDK
integrationsBrowserSdkPage.description: A typed JavaScript client for AACsearch. Single search, federated multi-search, facets — under 50ms p99.

integrationsBrowserSdk.title: Search from the browser
integrationsBrowserSdk.subtitle: NPM package. TypeScript types. Works in React, Vue, Svelte, Astro, or plain JS. No backend proxy required.

typedClient.title: Full TypeScript types
typedClient.description: Autocomplete on every method. No guessing response shapes. Types ship with the package — no @types/ needed.

singleSearch.title: Single search
singleSearch.description: search(indexSlug, query, options) → typed results. Facets, filters, sort, pagination — all in the options object.

multiSearch.title: Multi-search (federated)
multiSearch.description: multiSearch([...queries]) → typed results array. One HTTP request, parallel execution, independent facets.

tokenHandling.title: Scoped token support
tokenHandling.description: Initialise with a short-lived scoped token from your server. The SDK attaches it automatically to every request.

errorHandling.title: Typed error handling
errorHandling.description: Typed error objects with slug (search_failed, quota_exceeded, rate_limited). Catch and handle programmatically.

lightweight.title: Under 5KB gzipped
lightweight.description: Tree-shakeable ESM build. Only the methods you import are bundled. No runtime dependencies.

integrationsMcpPage.title: MCP Server integration
integrationsMcpPage.description: Model Context Protocol server for AI agents. Claude, Cursor, and any MCP client can search and manage indexes.

integrationsMcp.title: AI agents that search your data
integrationsMcp.subtitle: The AACsearch MCP Server exposes search, index management, and stats to any MCP-compatible AI assistant.

tools.title: 4 MCP tools
tools.description: search, list_indexes, upsert_document, search_stats — the core operations an AI agent needs over your data.

claude.title: Works with Claude
claude.description: Add the AACsearch MCP server to Claude Code or Claude Desktop. Ask natural-language questions over your indexed data.

cursor.title: Works with Cursor
cursor.description: Cursor's AI features can search your codebase index, documentation, or product data via the MCP integration.

transport.title: stdio transport
transport.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdio. Works with any MCP client. No HTTP server required — just point to the binary.

authentication.title: API key auth
authentication.description: Configure with a ss_search_* API key. The MCP server inherits the key's scopes and rate limits.

enterpriseReady.title: Enterprise ready
enterpriseReady.description: Scoped API key authentication, rate limiting, and tenant isolation. Integrate MCP into your enterprise workflows with confidence.

extensible.title: Extensible
extensible.description: Add custom tools for your workflow. Fork the MCP server, extend its capabilities, and integrate with your internal systems.

integrationsShopifyPage.title: AACsearch for Shopify
integrationsShopifyPage.description: Replace Shopify native search with AACsearch in under an hour. Products, variants, and inventory sync automatically.

integrationsShopify.title: Shopify search, reimagined
integrationsShopify.subtitle: Connect your Shopify store to AACsearch in minutes. Products appear in search immediately after publish — no manual sync required.

install.title: One-click install
install.description: Install the AACsearch app from the Shopify App Store. Connect your index with your API key and you are live in minutes.

productSync.title: Automatic product sync
productSync.description: New products, price changes, and stock updates sync to AACsearch via Shopify webhooks. Changes appear in search in under a second.

variantSync.title: Variant indexing
variantSync.description: Each product variant is indexed as a separate document. Customers can search by size, colour, or SKU directly.

metafields.title: Custom metafields
metafields.description: Index Shopify metafields as searchable and filterable fields. Expose custom product attributes without schema changes.

widget.title: Storefront widget
widget.description: Drop the AACsearch widget into your theme with one line of Liquid. Instant search, facets, and analytics out of the box.

analytics.title: Search analytics
analytics.description: See which queries convert, which hit dead ends, and how search contributes to revenue in your AACsearch dashboard.

integrationsWordpressPage.title: AACsearch for WordPress
integrationsWordpressPage.description: Replace WP_Query search with AACsearch. Posts, pages, custom post types, and ACF fields — all instantly searchable.

integrationsWordpress.title: WordPress search, without compromise
integrationsWordpress.subtitle: The AACsearch WordPress plugin indexes your content automatically and replaces the default search with instant, typo-tolerant results.

plugin.title: WordPress plugin
plugin.description: Install from the WordPress plugin directory. Supports WP 6.x, multisite, and WooCommerce. One settings page, no code required.

postSync.title: Post & page sync
postSync.description: All post types sync on publish and update. Deleted posts are removed from the index automatically via WordPress hooks.

customTypes.title: Custom post types & ACF
customTypes.description: Index custom post types and Advanced Custom Fields as searchable and facetable attributes. Full control over which fields are exposed.

widget.title: Gutenberg search block
widget.description: Replace the default search widget with the AACsearch block. Instant results, facet filters, and keyboard navigation.

multiSite.title: Multisite support
multiSite.description: Each site in a WordPress multisite network gets a separate AACsearch index with its own API key and analytics.

analytics.title: Search analytics
analytics.description: WordPress editors see top queries, zero-result rates, and search-driven page views directly in the AACsearch dashboard.

integrationsWoocommercePage.title: AACsearch for WooCommerce
integrationsWoocommercePage.description: WooCommerce search that scales with your catalog. Products, variations, and attributes synced in real time.

integrationsWoocommerce.title: WooCommerce search that converts
integrationsWoocommerce.subtitle: Replace WooCommerce default search with AACsearch instant, faceted product search — integrated in under an hour.

install.title: Plugin install
install.description: Install from the WordPress plugin directory or upload manually. Requires WooCommerce 8.x and an AACsearch API key.

productSync.title: Product sync
productSync.description: Products sync on publish, update, and deletion. Stock changes trigger automatic index updates via WooCommerce webhooks.

variantSync.title: Variation search
variantSync.description: Customers can search for specific variations by attribute — colour, size, material — without navigating to a product page first.

orderSearch.title: Order search
orderSearch.description: Index order history for logged-in customers. Fast, private order search scoped to the authenticated user account.

widget.title: Storefront widget
widget.description: Drop-in widget for your WooCommerce theme. Renders instant search results, facets, and add-to-cart without leaving the overlay.

analytics.title: Commerce analytics
analytics.description: Track search-to-cart conversion, zero-result rate, and top queries. Identify gaps in your catalog from real search data.

integrationsStrapiPage.title: AACsearch for Strapi
integrationsStrapiPage.description: Connect your Strapi CMS to AACsearch and get instant, multi-language search over all your content types.

integrationsStrapi.title: Strapi + AACsearch
integrationsStrapi.subtitle: The AACsearch Strapi plugin syncs your content types automatically. Publish new content and it appears in search within a second.

plugin.title: Strapi plugin
plugin.description: Install via npm: strapi-plugin-aacsearch. Configure with your API key and the plugin handles the rest.

contentTypes.title: All content types
contentTypes.description: Map any Strapi content type to an AACsearch collection. Nested relations, dynamic zones, and media fields all supported.

autoSync.title: Lifecycle hook sync
autoSync.description: Content syncs on afterCreate, afterUpdate, and afterDelete Strapi lifecycle hooks. Zero-latency updates.

webhook.title: Webhook fallback
webhook.description: Configure a Strapi webhook as a fallback sync path. Guarantees delivery even if the lifecycle hook is missed during a migration.

widget.title: Frontend search widget
widget.description: Use the AACsearch browser SDK to build instant search for your Strapi-powered frontend — React, Vue, or vanilla JS.

analytics.title: Content search analytics
analytics.description: See which content types get the most search traffic and which queries find no results. Drive editorial decisions with search data.

integrationsContentfulPage.title: AACsearch for Contentful
integrationsContentfulPage.description: Sync Contentful entries to AACsearch and power instant search for your content-driven product.

integrationsContentful.title: Contentful + AACsearch
integrationsContentful.subtitle: Connect Contentful to AACsearch with a webhook. New and updated entries appear in search within a second of publication.

app.title: Contentful app
app.description: Install the AACsearch app from the Contentful Marketplace. Configure index mappings for each content model in the UI.

contentTypes.title: Content model mapping
contentTypes.description: Map any content type field to an AACsearch attribute. Rich text fields are automatically converted to plain text for search.

autoSync.title: Publish-triggered sync
autoSync.description: Contentful sends a webhook on every publish event. AACsearch processes the payload and updates the index in under a second.

webhook.title: Webhook configuration
webhook.description: Configure Contentful webhooks in your AACsearch dashboard — no code required. Events for create, update, unpublish, and archive.

widget.title: JavaScript SDK
widget.description: Use the AACsearch browser SDK with any Contentful-powered frontend. React hooks, Vue composables, and vanilla JS all supported.

analytics.title: Content analytics
analytics.description: Understand which content entries surface in search, which topics have gaps, and how search drives content engagement.

integrationsSanityPage.title: AACsearch for Sanity
integrationsSanityPage.description: Index Sanity documents in AACsearch and power instant, schema-aware search for any Sanity-powered product.

integrationsSanity.title: Sanity + AACsearch
integrationsSanity.subtitle: GROQ queries select which documents to index. Sanity webhooks keep AACsearch in sync without any cron jobs.

plugin.title: Sanity Studio plugin
plugin.description: Install sanity-plugin-aacsearch from npm. Manage index mappings and trigger resyncs directly from Sanity Studio.

schemaSync.title: Schema-aware indexing
schemaSync.description: Map any Sanity schema type to an AACsearch collection. Portable text, references, and arrays flattened automatically.

webhook.title: Webhook-driven sync
webhook.description: Sanity delivers document changes to AACsearch via HTTPS webhook. New documents, updates, and deletions all handled automatically.

groq.title: GROQ-selected fields
groq.description: Write a GROQ projection to select exactly which fields to index. Only the data your search needs leaves your Sanity dataset.

widget.title: Frontend integration
widget.description: The AACsearch browser SDK works with any Sanity-powered frontend. Use the React hooks or vanilla JS client.

analytics.title: Search analytics
analytics.description: Track which document types get searched, which queries fail, and how search discovery drives downstream conversions.

integrationsNextJsPage.title: AACsearch for Next.js
integrationsNextJsPage.description: Add search to your Next.js app in minutes. Server Components, App Router, and edge-compatible SDK — all supported.

integrationsNextJs.title: Next.js + AACsearch
integrationsNextJs.subtitle: The AACsearch SDK is designed for Next.js. Works with App Router, Pages Router, Server Components, and Vercel Edge Runtime.

sdk.title: TypeScript SDK
sdk.description: Install the AACsearch npm package. Full TypeScript types, zero external dependencies, 8KB gzipped. Works in any JS runtime.

serverComponents.title: React Server Components
serverComponents.description: Call the AACsearch API directly from Server Components. No client bundle cost, no hydration overhead for search-result pages.

appRouter.title: App Router compatible
appRouter.description: Route handlers, server actions, and streaming — all work with the AACsearch SDK. No special adapters required.

caching.title: Next.js cache integration
caching.description: Use fetch with next revalidate or ISR to cache search results. AACsearch honors standard HTTP Cache-Control headers.

widget.title: Client-side widget
widget.description: Add the AACsearch widget to your Next.js layout with one script tag, or use the React SDK for a fully customisable search UI.

analytics.title: Edge-compatible analytics
analytics.description: Track search events from the Vercel Edge Network. No cold starts, no timeout risk for lightweight analytics calls.

integrationsReactPage.title: AACsearch for React
integrationsReactPage.description: React hooks, components, and an SDK for building instant search UIs. Typed, composable, and framework-agnostic.

integrationsReact.title: React + AACsearch
integrationsReact.subtitle: Build a fully custom search UI with React hooks and the AACsearch SDK. No magic — just data-fetching and state you control.

sdk.title: React SDK
sdk.description: Install the AACsearch React package. Hooks for search, autocomplete, and facets. Full TypeScript types, zero peer dependencies.

hooks.title: Composable hooks
hooks.description: useSearch, useAutocomplete, and useFacets return typed data and loading states. Compose them into any UI you want.

components.title: Headless components
components.description: Unstyled headless components for search input, results list, and facets. Bring your own CSS — no Tailwind lock-in.

ssr.title: SSR & hydration
ssr.description: Pre-fetch search results on the server and hydrate on the client without a flash of empty content.

typescript.title: Full TypeScript support
typescript.description: SDK types are generated from the AACsearch OpenAPI spec. Autocomplete for every field in your collection schema.

analytics.title: Event tracking
analytics.description: The SDK includes a trackEvent call for result clicks, filter usage, and zero-result reporting. Feeds your AACsearch dashboard.

integrationsNextJsSetup.title: Get started in 3 steps
integrationsNextJsSetup.subtitle: No backend changes required. The AACsearch SDK works directly from your Next.js app.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Install the package
step1.description: Run npm install @aacsearch/client in your Next.js project.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Configure your client
step2.description: Create a search client with your API key and index slug. Keep the key server-side or use a scoped read-only token for client components.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Search from any component
step3.description: Call client.search() from a Server Component or use the useSearch hook in a Client Component. Results are typed.

q1.question: Does it work with Next.js 13, 14, and 15?
q1.answer: Yes. The SDK is compatible with Next.js 13, 14, and 15. It works with both the App Router and the Pages Router without any adapters.

q2.question: Can I use it with Vercel Edge Runtime?
q2.answer: Yes. The AACsearch client uses the standard Fetch API and is fully compatible with Vercel Edge Runtime and Cloudflare Workers.

q3.question: How do I protect my API key on the client?
q3.answer: Use a scoped token with read-only permissions for client-side search. Create it from your AACsearch dashboard — the full admin key stays on the server only.

integrationsReactSetup.title: Add search to your React app in 3 steps
integrationsReactSetup.subtitle: Works with React 17, 18, and 19. Framework-agnostic — Next.js, Remix, Vite, and CRA all supported.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Install the package
step1.description: Run npm install @aacsearch/react in your project.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Use the useSearch hook
step2.description: Pass your API key and index slug. The hook returns hits, loading state, and a setQuery function.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Render results
step3.description: Map over hits and display them in your own UI. No required wrapper components — full styling freedom.

q1.question: Which React versions are supported?
q1.answer: React 17, 18, and 19 are supported. The hooks use standard React state and effects — no unstable APIs or experimental features.

q2.question: Does it work with Next.js or Remix?
q2.answer: Yes. The React hooks work in any React environment. For Next.js Server Components, use the base @aacsearch/client package which has no React dependency.

q3.question: Is there a component library or just hooks?
q3.answer: Both. @aacsearch/react includes composable hooks (useSearch, useAutocomplete, useFacets) and unstyled headless components. Bring your own CSS or Tailwind.

integrationsPrestashopSetup.title: Install in 5 minutes
integrationsPrestashopSetup.subtitle: No PHP coding required. The module handles sync automatically after configuration.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Download the module
step1.description: Get aacsearch.zip from your AACsearch dashboard under Connectors → PrestaShop.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Upload to PrestaShop
step2.description: Go to Modules > Module Manager > Upload a module. Select the ZIP and confirm.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Enter your connector token
step3.description: Paste the connector token from your AACsearch dashboard into the module settings and save.

step4.label: Step 4
step4.title: Run full catalog export
step4.description: Click "Full export" in the module admin panel. Your entire product catalog syncs in one batch.

step5.label: Step 5
step5.title: Search is live
step5.description: Products appear in AACsearch immediately. Future saves, updates, and deletes sync automatically via PrestaShop hooks.

q1.question: Which PrestaShop versions are supported?
q1.answer: PrestaShop 8.0 and 8.1 are fully supported. PHP 8.1+ required. Works with all major themes including Hummingbird and Classic.

q2.question: Does the module slow down product saves?
q2.answer: No. Sync is asynchronous via the AACsearch ingest buffer. The module enqueues the update and returns immediately — no blocking calls to Typesense on save.

q3.question: Can I customize which fields are indexed?
q3.answer: Yes. The module exports all product fields by default. You can restrict attributes in the module settings or extend the Exporter class for custom logic.

integrationsBitrixSetup.title: Install in 5 minutes
integrationsBitrixSetup.subtitle: No Bitrix customizations required. The module installs as a standard Bitrix marketplace module.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Download the module
step1.description: Get the aac.search archive from your AACsearch dashboard under Connectors → 1C-Bitrix.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Unpack to /local/modules/
step2.description: Extract the archive to /local/modules/aac.search/ on your Bitrix server. Keep the directory structure intact.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Install from Bitrix admin
step3.description: Go to Bitrix admin → Marketplace → Installed modules. Find "AACsearch" in the list and click Install.

step4.label: Step 4
step4.title: Configure the connector
step4.description: Enter your connector token and iBlock ID in the module settings. Choose the catalog iBlock type and save.

step5.label: Step 5
step5.title: Run initial sync
step5.description: Click "Run full sync" on the Diagnostics tab. All catalog items are indexed. Future changes sync automatically via event handlers.

q1.question: Which Bitrix editions are supported?
q1.answer: Bitrix Site Manager and Business editions are supported. PHP 8.1+ required. Uses standard Bitrix HttpClient — no third-party HTTP libraries needed.

q2.question: How does the background sync agent work?
q2.answer: The module registers a Bitrix agent that runs a periodic full sync for reliability. It catches any catalog changes missed by real-time event handlers, ensuring no products are out of sync.

q3.question: Can I customize which iBlock properties are indexed?
q3.answer: Yes. The module exports all product properties by default. You can limit the fields in the admin settings or extend the ProductExporter class for fully custom field selection.
